title: BigBear pushes into agentic AI arena with $250M acquisition
text: BigBear.ai has made a strategic push into the agentic AI arena with its $250 million acquisition of Ask Sage. The acquisition marks a significant expansion of BigBear.ai's AI capabilities, adding secure generative AI platforms to its existing analytics and decision support offerings. Ask Sage is a generative AI platform engineered for secure deployment across defense, intelligence, and regulated sectors. The platform serves over 100,000 users within 16,000 government teams and numerous commercial organizations. The Ask Sage acquisition strengthens BigBear.ai's position in the rapidly growing defense AI market and enables the company to offer comprehensive AI-driven solutions for government customers. The acquisition is expected to deliver annual recurring revenue of approximately $25 million in 2025, with projected growth in subsequent years. The combined entity leverages BigBear.ai's mission-focused approach with Ask Sage's cutting-edge generative AI technology, positioning the company to compete for significant national security and defense contracts. The agentic AI capabilities from Ask Sage complement BigBear.ai's existing platform, enabling the company to deliver more comprehensive AI solutions that address evolving customer requirements in threat detection, operational optimization, and real-time decision-making.
